intro: Between 13 and 26 April 2026, ZCyberNews published eight articles tagged with rapid7. The coverage highlighted activity by the threat actor Kyber and the critical-severity vulnerability CVE-2025-59718, which carries a CVSS score of 9.8. Affected sectors included financial services, government, and technology, with reported incidents in Europe and North America. The article mix comprised one critical, one high, and four informational pieces.
